hero_subtitle: Upload a photo. Get your royal portrait in seconds. Free to preview - no credit card, no commitments, no peasantry.
upload_max_error: You can only upload up to {{max}} images at once.
upload_type_error: Please upload only JPG, PNG, or WebP images.
upload_size_error: All images must be smaller than {{max}}MB.
upload_select_error: Please select at least one image first
upload_rate_limit_reached: Rate limit reached. Please try again later.
upload_prompt_title: Upload 1-{{max}} Photos - Peasants, nobility, and pets all welcome.
upload_prompt_subtitle: (Clear face required. Sunglasses and hats are frowned upon by the court.)
preview_store_subtitle: Pixels are temporary. Oil paint lasts centuries.
cred_desc_1: For over ten years, we’ve been turning everyday humans and exceptionally good pets into historical royalty.
cred_desc_2: No oversized office printers. Just master artists and a blank canvas.
cred_desc_3: Because a regular selfie simply doesn't command enough respect.
cred_desc_4: Painted so beautifully, your descendants will literally fight over it.
email_prompt_desc: You've created a few portraits today! To continue generating safely, please enter your email address.
testimonial_1_quote: This was the perfect Christmas gift. I ordered a hand-painted portrait of my husband with our German Shepherd, and the result was absolutely stunning! The detail and care that went into the painting are remarkable. It genuinely captured both his expression and our dog's personality. This is our second custom piece from Nobilified, and once again the quality and artistry were exceptional. These paintings bring so much joy into our home, and we will absolutely be ordering more for each of our pets :)
testimonial_2_quote: The portrait is amazing, we couldn't be happier! The Artist did an incredible job and the frame and presentation is brilliant. Mike helped make sure it arrived before Christmas despite the work load and the package arrived December 23rd! This is the 2nd portrait I've ordered from you guys in the past few years. Makes the perfect gift and family heirloom!
testimonial_3_quote: Very fun gift and Perry was very happy with it. Family heirloom on full display in the dining room!
testimonial_4_quote: Thrilled with the painting! It's the second one we have in our home. They worked to get the right look of my wife and perfected our dog. We will certainly have more paintings done in the future. Communication was great. The entire experience with the company is top tier.
testimonial_5_quote: The initial images were emailed to me for approval. The portrait had some small details that I wanted to change. Nobilified made it easy and the changes were exactly as I had hoped. Great job. This is our third purchase from them and I expect to send them an annual order (we are using this as a teaching award).
testimonial_6_quote: We're so happy with the painting, it turned out great! The communication and ordering was overall an easy experience. Thank you again!
preview_canvas_benefit_3: wrapped on an ornate gold frame.
preview_canvas_process_desc: Allow roughly 4 weeks for our artists to meticulously hand-paint, dry, frame, and safely ship your bespoke masterpiece.
preview_digital_benefit_2: Perfect for social media or your own printing.
preview_description: You've seen the portrait. Now make it permanent... Commission one of our master artists to bring your digital concept to life. 100% hand-painted using authentic oil paints on premium canvas—just like the royals did it.
preview_real_art_desc: No digital printing. Every brushstroke is painted by hand.
preview_museum_desc: Rich, textured oil paints that look incredible on any wall.
preview_heirloom_desc: A timeless conversation piece guaranteed to outlast your hard drive.
preview_generate_another: Not quite right? → Generate a new portrait
preview_loading_tagline_desc: For over ten years, we've been turning everyday humans and exceptionally good pets into historical royalty.
illustration_headline: Don't Just Save It. Immortalize It.
illustration_sub: Pixels are temporary. Oil paint lasts centuries.
illustration_proof_text: Real artists. Real canvas. Ships ready to hang.
illustration_celeb_headline: We've Painted Some People You Might Recognize.
illustration_celeb_sub: Over 10,000 portraits and counting — including a few celebrities who commissioned us to immortalize them in style.
illustration_celeb_caption: "The Backstreet Boys. All five. Each one a hand-painted oil masterpiece."
